name: Arushi Purkayastha

find.name: Ayla
find.why: You should meet Ayla because you both share a passion for audio tool building and can exchange inspiring ideas and experiences.

find.name: Asia Chang
find.why: You should meet Asia Chang because her innovative approach to creativity will inspire you both to turn your imaginative ideas into tangible realities.
find.match_belief: Thousands of in-between frames become a creature. That moment when it stops being pixels and starts being alive—that's everything.

profile.belief: A tool that lets people tap their weirdness is how you multiply one person's strange idea across thousands.
profile.working_on: Building app that transforms random urban sounds into playable instruments musicians perform with in real time

hidden_prompt: Somewhere in this room is the person behind "Animating character fear through micro-gestures—eye flickers, breath catches—so subtle audiences feel it before they know they're watching." Go find them.
magic_inference: Your drive stems from a desire to celebrate individuality, transforming the chaos of urban life into a shared musical experience that inspires creativity.
